response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile engineer with a strong craftsmanship background (TDD, tooling, developer experience) and even direct IDE development experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI). However, the role demands deep Java and Kotlin expertise with strong Spring ecosystem knowledge, and the candidate's career centers on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and C/C++, with only incidental Java exposure and no evident Kotlin, Spring, or JVM-internals work. The core required qualifications are not met.
strengths: Hands-on IDE development experience (NI LabWindows/CVI components in C/C++)
Strong developer-tooling and testing background (test runners, assertion libraries, MCP code generators)
Long track record across complex systems, including low-latency high-throughput services
concerns: No substantial Java or Kotlin experience; JVM depth not demonstrated
No Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise-framework background
Primary stack (TypeScript/Node.js, DLang) misaligned with the role's core technical focus
